tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by: jobi-wan-kanobi

[ch]Dadd4/A[/ch]  5540xx
[ch]C/G[/ch]      3320xx

* change to these chords on beat 4 of the bar, then hold for the next bar.


[Intro]
[ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]F#m[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
There's a time and place for everything, for everyone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
We can push with all our might[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
But nothin's gonna come       Oh no, nothin's gonna change[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
And if I asked you not to try[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Oh, could you let it be[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
I wanna hold you and say, we can't throw this all away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]
Tell me you won't go, you won't go, do you have to hear me say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
I can't stop lovin' you,     and no matter what I say or do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
You know my heart is true, oh, I can't stop lovin' you[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
You can change your friends, your place in life, you can change your mind[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
We can change the things we say and do anytime[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
Oh no, but I think you'll find[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
That when you look inside your heart[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
Oh baby, I'll be there, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Hold on, I'm holding on[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
Baby, just come on, come on, come on, I just wanna hear you say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
I can't stop lovin' you,     and no matter what you say or do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
You know my heart is true, oh, I can't stop lovin' you[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, I'm so twisted and tied, and all I remember[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Was how hard we tried, only to surrender[/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Dadd4/A[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]*    [ch]Dadd4/A[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]*
[ch]Dadd4/A[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]*    [ch]Dadd4/A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]*


[Pre-Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
  And when it's over, I know how it's gonna be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
And true love will never die, oh, not fade away[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I can't stop lovin' you,   and no matter what I say or do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You know my heart is true, oh, I can't stop lovin' you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I know what I got to do[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Hey Ray, what you said is true, oh, I can't stop lovin' you, oh[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
(Ooh-ooh-oo-ooh      Ooh-ooh-oo-ooh)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Oh-oh, I can't stop lovin' you[/tab]
